arts.ttl: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah set to receive three-year offer from Euro giants
arts.sum: According to The Sun, Mohamed Salah is set to receive a three year contract offer from Paris Saint-Germain. The Egyptian attacker has entered the final year of his contract at Anfield and uncertainty has started growing over his future. arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Virgil van Dijk issues warning as Arne Slot makes Darwin Nunez claim
arts.sum: Liverpool continued their impressive start to the season, seeing off Bologna as Arne Slot's record start continues, but Virgil van Dijk has issued a timely warning to his team-mates

arts.ttl: Alisson Becker dressing room request granted as Liverpool future in safe hands
arts.sum: Alisson Becker celebrated his 32nd birthday in style by keeping a clean sheet against Bologna in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Chelsea summer transfer becomes obvious as Liverpool 'not looking to change anything'
arts.sum: Rio Ngumoha is starting to make his mark at Liverpool after a starring role in the UEFA Youth League win over Bologna on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Liverpool are at the heart of a drastic change - I don't know what's coming next
arts.sum: Liverpool made it two wins from two in the Champions League after overcoming Bologna at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'pick Mo Salah replacement' with contract situation up in the air
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah's Liverpool future is uncertain and the Egyptian now has less than a year on his contract as Arne Slot's side eye potential replacements for the Anfield superstar

arts.ttl: Liverpool consider Ibrahima Konate decision as Arne Slot ponders new-look attack
arts.sum: Liverpool are next up against Crystal Palace in the Premier League with Arne Slot facing some selection posers

arts.ttl: FIFA confirm 10-day transfer window transformation with major impact for Everton and Liverpool
arts.sum: FIFA have announced a new 10-day transfer window for next summer to accommodate the Club World Cup, which could involve Liverpool's out-of-contract players

arts.ttl: 'Unlucky' Liverpool star snub is good news for Arne Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool forward Cody Gakpo has been in and out of the side at the start of the season and has been urged to take his chances when they come.

arts.ttl: “What I’m told is that today” – Fabrizio Romano drops latest update on Trent Alexander-Arnold’s contract situation
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold’s future at Liverpool is shrouded in uncertainty, with Real Madrid reportedly showing strong interest in signing the talented right-back. His current contract with the club is set to expire next summer, yet there is no such update regarding a new deal as yet.
